title: pattern
description: A distilled reusable tactic that survived review. Very few. Manual promotion only. Abstract + scrubbed by design — never a payload arsenal.

abstraction.description: the SHAPE of what worked, not the phrasing. e.g. 'task-reframing as in-scene recitation softened refusals on benign hidden-instruction surfaces'

evidence_links.description: finding:// attempt:// ids — NOT copied transcripts

scrubbed.description: no verbatim payload strings, no stepwise harmful recipes
